name: Peanut Butter Fingers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9 x 13 inch pan.
3. Measure the flour and level it off.
4. In a large bowl, combine all bar ingredients and mix until a soft dough forms.
5. Press the dough into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Sprinkle chocolate chips over the baked bars.
8. Let cool for 5 minutes before spreading evenly.
9. In a small bowl, combine frosting ingredients and adjust consistency with milk if needed.
10. Drizzle frosting over the chocolate chips.
11. Allow to cool completely; cut into bars.
Pillsbury - Desserts & Sweets.
Exchanges: 2 starch, 2 fat.
